data.title: Community Effort and Santa Cruz Toyota Provide Life-Changing Mobility for Local Family
data.description: In April 24, 2026, in Santa Cruz, California, a family from Santa Cruz County is receiving a mobility vehicle that will drastically improve their lives. The vehicle was made possible through months of fundraising efforts within the community. The donation was a result of the collective support and generosity of neighbors, local organizations, and supporters from various areas. This act of kindness reflects the unity and compassion of the community towards providing essential assistance to those in need.

data.title: Stanley Black & Decker Announces 2nd Quarter 2026 Dividend and New Share Repurchase Authorization
data.description: In New Britain, Connecticut, on April 24, 2026, Stanley Black & Decker (NYSE: SWK), known for its tools and outdoor solutions, revealed that its Board of Directors has given the green light for a regular second quarter cash dividend of $0.83 per common share. This move signifies the company's commitment to rewarding its shareholders with a consistent payout.

data.title: Second state in U.S. to ban Bitcoin, crypto ATMs, Tennessee makes it illegal to own/operate machines.
data.description: The state of Tennessee has recently passed a law that prohibits the ownership and operation of Bitcoin and cryptocurrency ATMs within its jurisdiction. This makes Tennessee the second state in the U.S. to implement such a restriction. Anyone found in possession of or using these machines will now be committing a criminal act. The new law aims to regulate the use of digital currencies within the state and comes amidst rising concerns about the potential misuse of cryptocurrency.

data.title: KB HOME, NEVADA GOVERNOR JOE LOMBARDO AND CITY OF HENDERSON MAYOR MICHELLE ROMERO CELEBRATE THE OPENING OF MERIDEN, A NEW LAS VEGAS-AREA MASTER PLAN
data.description: Recently, KB Home, a renowned homebuilding company in the U.S., announced the opening of five new communities in Henderson, Nevada. These communities offer homes priced affordably starting from the mid $300,000s. The ribbon-cutting ceremony for the unveiling of these new communities took place on Thursday, attended by Nevada Governor Joe. KB Home, a trusted name in the industry, provides potential homebuyers with attractive options in this region.

data.title: Z Squared Announces Completion of Business Combination with Coeptis Therapeutics and Listing on the Nasdaq Global Market
data.description: On Monday, April 27, 2026, Z Squared, Inc. will start trading shares on the Nasdaq Global Market using the ticker symbol "ZSQR." The company, based in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, announced this move on April 24, 2026. Z Squared is identified by the ticker symbol ZSQR on Nasdaq. It operates as a vertically integrated computing infrastructure enterprise.

data.title: First Capital, Inc. Reports Quarterly Earnings
data.description: CORYDON, Indiana - First Capital, Inc. (NASDAQ: FCAP), the parent company of First Harrison Bank, announced a quarterly net income of $4.3 million, or $1.30 per diluted share, for the period ending on March 31, 2026. This is an increase compared to the previous year's net income of $3.2 million, or $0.97 per diluted share, for the same quarter.

data.title: Armstrong World Industries Announces Quarterly Dividend
data.description: Armstrong World Industries, Inc., a major player in the design and production of interior and exterior architectural solutions such as ceilings and specialty walls, disclosed today that its Board of Directors has approved a cash dividend of $0.339 per common stock share. The dividend is scheduled to be disbursed on May 26, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 11, 2026.

data.title: Energy Vault Holdings, Inc. Announces New Hire Awards Under NYSE Listing Rule 303A.08
data.description: Energy Vault Holdings, Inc., a leading energy storage company based in Westlake Village, California, revealed that on March 11, 2026, the Compensation Committee of its Board of Directors approved the issuance of restricted stock units and performance-based awards to four new employees. This grant encompasses a total of 353,500 shares of the company's common stock under the Energy Vault Holdings, Inc. 2022 Employment Inducement Award Plan. The awards are aimed at attracting and retaining key talent within the organization.

data.title: Core Scientific, Inc. Schedules First Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Earnings Release, Conference Call and Webcast
data.description: A digital infrastructure company, Core Scientific, Inc. (Nasdaq: CORZ), based in Austin, Texas, will be sharing its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 on Wednesday, May 6, 2026. The announcement will be made after the close of the financial markets. The company specializes in high-density colocation services. The management team will conduct a conference call and live audio webcast at 3:30 p.m. Central Time on the same day to discuss the results. This update pertains to the financial highlights of the initial quarter of 2026.

data.title: OzCon Exposes Real-World Cyber Attacks May 18
data.description: A conference in Overland Park, Kansas on April 24, 2026, shed light on the evolving nature of modern attacks. Rather than forcibly entering systems, attackers are exploiting existing pathways. OzCon, scheduled for May 18, will delve into real-world cyber attack tactics, revealing how adversaries operate.

data.title: Cerapedics Announces Supplier Agreement with Vizient for PearlMatrix® P-15 Peptide Enhanced Bone Graft
data.description: An agreement has been reached that will enhance access to Cerapedics Inc.'s range of peptide-based drug-device offerings for spinal fusion surgeries. This agreement signifies a significant expansion in the availability of these products, with Cerapedics Inc. being a worldwide orthopedic firm focused on transforming bone repair processes. The announcement was made in Westminster, Colo., on April 24, 2026. This development allows a broader audience to take advantage of Cerapedics Inc.'s innovative solutions for spinal fusion procedures, underscoring the company's commitment to advancing orthopedic care.

data.title: Travelers Expands Availability of Homeowners Insurance Under California’s Sustainable Insurance Strategy
data.description: The Travelers Companies, Inc. (NYSE: TRV) has chosen to join California’s Sustainable Insurance Strategy (SIS), a program led by Insurance Commissioner Ricardo Lara, to enhance homeowners insurance availability in the state. By participating voluntarily and notifying the California Department of Insurance (CDI), Travelers aims to broaden its coverage reach. This initiative enables insurance providers to integrate innovative wildfire catastrophe models and reinsurance expenses into their pricing structures for better risk management and sustainable practices.

data.title: DOJ supports Elon Musk's xAI in battle against Colorado's AI bias law, intervening in lawsuit.
data.description: The Justice Department has taken steps to get involved in a lawsuit filed by xAI against Colorado's law on algorithmic discrimination.

data.title: Brad Schneider Completes Acquisition of The Growth Coach Franchise System
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio, on April 24, 2026, Strategic Franchising Systems, a multi-brand franchise development system, revealed that a long-time franchise owner and brand president is now leading the company. This individual is continuing a 20-year legacy of helping small business owners throughout America.

data.title: Citius Pharmaceuticals Announces Closing of Registered Direct Offering of $5 Million Priced At-The-Market Under Nasdaq Rules
data.description: On April 24, 2026, Citius Pharmaceuticals Inc. (Nasdaq: CTXR), a biopharmaceutical company focused on innovative critical care products, completed its latest financial transaction. The company, known for its dedication to developing and bringing to market cutting-edge medical solutions, disclosed the finalization of the deal.
